Who I Am
About Me

Hi! I'm Tanish Patel, a passionate Computer Science Engineering student specialising in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research, Indore — currently in my 2nd Year, 4th Semester.

I qualified JEE with a 63 percentile and scored 84.4% in Class 12 (MP Board, Science stream). I enjoy building real-world AI solutions — from designing ML pipelines to implementing neural networks.

Outside of studies, I constantly sharpen my skills through certifications on Infosys Springboard and NPTEL, and explore the latest advancements in AI research.

Machine Learning Deep Learning Data Structures Python Problem Solving AI Research
